id: get-dig-deeper

description: "Gets a detailed breakdown of energy usage by category and subcategory."

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets 'dig deeper' analysis."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/Insights/{customerId}/{customerSiteId}/digdeeper"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets a detailed breakdown of energy usage by category and subcategory.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"customerId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"customerSiteId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer Site ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"granularity","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Granularity: day, week, or month","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["day","week","month"]}},{"name":"startDate","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Start date (ISO 8601 local time)","schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},{"name":"endDate","in":"query","required":false,"description":"End date (ISO 8601 local time)","schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},{"name":"includeToday","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Include current day data","schema":{"type":"boolean"}},{"name":"fuelType","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Fuel type: gas or electric","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["gas","electric"]}},{"name":"name","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Category name filter","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"subcategory","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Subcategory name filter","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns detailed usage breakdown.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customerId":{"type":"integer","example":699493},"customerSiteId":{"type":"integer","example":799644},"granularityTypeId":{"type":"integer","example":7},"billContributors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Category name","example":"Kitchen"},"usages":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"subCategory":{"type":"string","example":"Cooking"},"cost":{"type":"number","example":15.5},"totalUnit":{"type":"number","example":45.2},"percentage":{"type":"number","example":12.5},"startDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-05-01T00:00:00"},"endDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-06-01T00:00:00"}},"title":"UsageDetail"}}},"title":"BillContributor"}}},"title":"DigDeeperResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
